sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55015" key="katarrapte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταρραπτέον</orth>, <sense id="n55015.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must stitch up</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl>(?)ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:3:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.3.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
